about.title: About me
about.quote: Design mixed with a little compassion goes a long way in crafting enriching experiences, elevating lives & building dreams
paragraphs: You probably don't see it, but there's a gap between good looking spaces and quality living spaces.
Thoughtful circulation and healthy ventilation are but sacrifices, made to keep up with the numbers.
This gap is easier to fill than you think. Design mixed with just a little compassion can go a long way.
